[Info]: Hi Adam, my name is Dan Saunders and I am the owner/operator of Window & Solar Care. Thanks for selecting me to give you a quote on cleaning your windows. My typical service includes: On the inside; Vacuuming all inside tracks, wipe the sills, clean the inside windows. On the outside; brush the outside tracks, cobweb clean around all window frames, dry brush both sides of the screens and finally clean the outside windows. My pricing is as follows: $5.00/pane (not window) to clean the glass inside and out. $30.00 flat fee to vacuum inside tracks. $30.00 flat fee to clean the screens. $20.00 total for each set of glass sliding doors. French Pane windows or doors are priced at $1.75 per pane. I do have a minimum charge of $75.00. I also charge $5.00/panel to clean Solar panels ($50.00 minimum charge) if you have the need. I have openings next week if that works for your schedule. Please contact me if I can be of help. Dan Saunders Window & Solar Care 855-245-2273
